mapper.insert: insert into video (device_id, file_name, description, file_path, file_type, file_size, start_time, end_time, duration, resolution, width, height, fps, codec, format, thumbnail_url, status, detection_status, total_frames, processed_frames, detection_count, upload_user_id) values (#{deviceId}, #{fileName}, #{description}, #{filePath}, #{fileType}, #{fileSize}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{duration}, #{resolution}, #{width}, #{height}, #{fps}, #{codec}, #{format}, #{thumbnailUrl}, #{status}, #{detectionStatus}, #{totalFrames}, #{processedFrames}, #{detectionCount}, #{uploadUserId})
mapper.update: update video set file_name = #{fileName}, description = #{description}, update_time = now() where id = #{id}
mapper.delete:
delete from video where id in
#{id}
mapper.update: update video set detection_status = #{detectionStatus}, total_frames = #{totalFrames}, processed_frames = #{processedFrames}, detection_count = #{detectionCount}, update_time = now() where id = #{id}
